title: Smooth Interactions — Transitions
description: Add CSS transitions to make your blog theme feel alive and interactive. Apply smooth transitions to nav link hover effects, post card box-shadow changes on hover, and create a styled .btn button class with background, padding, border-radius, and a transition for hover state changes.
test_code:
assert 'transition' in css.lower(), 'Missing transition property'
assert '.btn' in css.lower(), 'Missing .btn selector'
assert ':hover' in css.lower(), 'Missing :hover pseudo-class'
assert 'transform' in css.lower() or 'box-shadow' in css.lower(), 'Hover effects should use transform or box-shadow changes'
acceptance_criteria: Nav links have smooth transitions on hover
.btn is styled with background, padding, border-radius, and a transition
.btn has a :hover effect using transform or background change
hints: transition: all 0.3s ease is a good general-purpose transition
For .post hover: box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) makes cards 'lift'
For .btn hover: transform: translateY(-2px) gives a subtle lift effect
